Class ProductController

java.lang.Object
com.example.milestone.controllers.ProductController
@Controller @RequestMapping("/products") public class ProductController extends Object
Processes product page requests. Controller that creates products, edits, deleting, and listing products for authenticated users.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductController(ProductService productService, UserRepository userRepository)
    Creates a product controller.

    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product>
    createProduct(@Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Creates a new product through JSON API If success, product is saved to database for current user.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductController

      public ProductController(ProductService productService, UserRepository userRepository)
      Creates a product controller.
      Parameters:
      productService - manages product operations
      userRepository - repository of users

  • Method Details

    • productListPage

      @GetMapping("/list") public String productListPage(org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Displays list of products page for authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      model - of product data passed to view
      auth - authentication object of session
      Returns:
      product list view

    • createProductPage

      @GetMapping("/new") public String createProductPage(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays product creation page.
      Parameters:
      model - of form data
      Returns:
      product form view

    • createProductSubmit

      @PostMapping("/new") public String createProductSubmit(@Valid @ModelAttribute("product") @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Handles submission of product creation form. On validation, user is saved to database. Invalid submission reroutes to the same product creation view.
      Parameters:
      product - is submitted product
      bindingResult - contains validation result of product
      model - this is used to return form if validation fails
      auth - the authentication object for session
      Returns:
      product list if successful, if not return product form view

    • editProductPage

      @GetMapping("/{id}/edit") public String editProductPage(@PathVariable UUID id, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Displays edit product form for specified user.
      Parameters:
      id - of the product to edit
      model - used to pass product data to view
      auth - authentication object for session
      Returns:
      product edit form if successful, if no product found then redirect back to list

    • updateProductSubmit

      @PostMapping("/{id}/edit") public String updateProductSubmit(@PathVariable UUID id, @Valid @ModelAttribute("product") @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Handles edit form submission for specified product. Success on submit updates product, if not successful then reroute back to form.
      Parameters:
      id - of product being updated
      product - data of updated product
      bindingResult - validation result of product
      model - used to return to form if error occurs
      auth - authentication object for current session
      Returns:
      product list on success, or product form view if invalid submission

    • listProducts

      @GetMapping @ResponseBody public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Product>> listProducts(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns all products owned by user as a JSON.
      Parameters:
      auth - authentication object for current session
      Returns:
      response containing user's products

    • getProduct

      @GetMapping("/{id}") @ResponseBody public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product> getProduct(@PathVariable UUID id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns a single product in JSON format.
      Parameters:
      id - of product to retrieve
      auth - authentication object for current session
      Returns:
      requested product or 404 error if not found

    • createProduct

      @PostMapping @ResponseBody public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Product> createProduct(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Creates a new product through JSON API If success, product is saved to database for current user.
      Parameters:
      product - the product that is submitted through request
      bindingResult - validation results for product
      auth - authentication object for current session
      Returns:
      created product on success, 400 on failure

    • updateProduct

      @PutMapping("/{id}") @ResponseBody public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> updateProduct(@PathVariable UUID id, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Updates existing product through JSON format
      Parameters:
      id - of the product to update
      product - updated product data from request body
      bindingResult - contains validation results for product
      auth - authentication object for current session
      Returns:
      204 success message if valid update, 400 if validation fails, 404 if product not found

    • deleteProduct

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") public String deleteProduct(@PathVariable UUID id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Deletes specific product for current user.
      Parameters:
      id - of product to delete
      auth - authentication object for the session
      Returns:
      redirect to product list page
